concepts.name: Hallucination in AI output
concepts.description: AI-generated content not supported by the underlying source signal.
enablers: LLM summarization without grounding constraints introduces fabrication risk, particularly when the source transcript is ambiguous or sparse.
interventions: Require human review and editing of all AI-generated notes before delivery to recipients; build review step into the workflow as mandatory, not optional.

evidence_refs.source_title: Ambient AI Scribes to Create Educational Feedback Notes for Medical Students: Randomized Trial
evidence_refs.extracted_quote: Review of 117 AI-generated feedback elements showed a 1.7% (n=2) hallucination rate, with most errors corrected during editing.

concepts.name: Mischaracterization in AI output
concepts.description: AI-generated content that misrepresents the source.
enablers: LLM tendency to smooth or generalize specific clinical observations into plausible-sounding but imprecise language.
interventions: Train users to critically read AI-generated summaries against source material rather than accepting plausible-sounding content at face value.

evidence_refs.source_title: Ambient AI Scribes to Create Educational Feedback Notes for Medical Students: Randomized Trial
evidence_refs.extracted_quote: Review of 117 AI-generated feedback elements showed a 6.8% (n=8) mischaracterization rate.

concepts.name: Reduced documentation burden
concepts.description: Net reduction in clinician/educator effort to produce required documentation.

evidence_refs.source_title: The Regional Implementation of an Electronic Health Record-Integrated Ambient Scribe in Primary and Secondary Care in England
evidence_refs.extracted_quote: Strong organizational drivers to improve efficiency, coupled with the technology's potential to help address clinician burnout, are accelerating interest and adoption.

evidence_refs.source_title: Ambient AI Scribes to Create Educational Feedback Notes for Medical Students: Randomized Trial
evidence_refs.extracted_quote: An ambient AI scribe-assisted workflow improved the quality of written narrative feedback with no observed increase in instructor effort compared to human-only documentation.

concepts.name: Improved attention to counterparty
concepts.description: Improved engagement with patient, learner, or other party during the encounter.

evidence_refs.source_title: The Regional Implementation of an Electronic Health Record-Integrated Ambient Scribe in Primary and Secondary Care in England
evidence_refs.extracted_quote: Automated note-taking often improved patient interaction.

concepts.name: Shift in communication style
concepts.description: Change in how participants speak during the encounter to accommodate or exploit the technology.

evidence_refs.source_title: The Regional Implementation of an Electronic Health Record-Integrated Ambient Scribe in Primary and Secondary Care in England
evidence_refs.extracted_quote: Automated note-taking often improved patient interaction but required clinicians to adjust how they spoke to ensure the technology captured their reasoning.

concepts.name: Integration burden
concepts.description: Effort and cost incurred to fit the technology into existing systems and workflows.
enablers: Proprietary vendor systems with limited EHR integration APIs force organizations to choose between ease of adoption (stand-alone) and long-term efficiency (integrated).
interventions: Carefully evaluate stand-alone vs. EHR-integrated deployment paths before procurement, weighting long-term efficiency and safety against adoption ease.

evidence_refs.source_title: The Regional Implementation of an Electronic Health Record-Integrated Ambient Scribe in Primary and Secondary Care in England
evidence_refs.extracted_quote: Stand-alone systems were easier to adopt but offered limited long-term benefits, while integrated systems required greater effort and standardization, yet promised improved efficiency and safety.

evidence_refs.source_title: Ambient AI Scribes to Create Educational Feedback Notes for Medical Students: Randomized Trial
evidence_refs.extracted_quote: Task load was high, and usability was marginal in both the control and intervention groups, with no significant differences (P=.31 and P=.40, respectively).

concepts.name: Template rigidity
concepts.description: Restrictiveness imposed by standardized or vendor-controlled templates.
enablers: Differences in documentation format and workflow between general practice and secondary care complicate template design, defaulting to conservative generic output.

evidence_refs.source_title: The Regional Implementation of an Electronic Health Record-Integrated Ambient Scribe in Primary and Secondary Care in England
evidence_refs.extracted_quote: Outputs were sometimes generic, reinforcing defensive documentation and reducing personal tone or contextual recall.

concepts.name: Improved Output Quality
concepts.description: AI-assisted workflows produce written artifacts of measurably higher quality than human-only approaches, as assessed by structured scoring instruments or expert review. Applies across clinical documentation, educational feedback, and other AI-mediated writing tasks.

evidence_refs.source_title: Ambient AI Scribes to Create Educational Feedback Notes for Medical Students: Randomized Trial
evidence_refs.extracted_quote: EFeCT scores on the scale from 0 to 5 were higher for human-edited AI narratives (median 3.00, IQR 2.00-4.00) than for human-only narratives (median 2.00, IQR 1.75-3.00; P<.001).
